prestazioni: Engine: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant for VF SS) – Forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (12psi boost, 650whp on E85) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Callies crank, Manley H-beam rods) and LS9 head gaskets for reliability. Supporting mods include a custom billet fuel system with dual Bosch 450LPH pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1050X injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU for precise tuning.

Drivetrain: Upgraded Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual conversion (from VF SS-V Redline) with a twin-disc SPEC Stage 3+ clutch and lightweight flywheel. Rear differential upgraded to a Harrop ELocker 3.91:1 LSD with billet axles and C&R Racing differential cooler to handle increased torque.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for VF chassis) with polyelastomer bushings (SuperPro 694R) replacing all factory rubber. Front sway bar upgraded to Whiteline 27mm adjustable, rear sway bar to 24mm. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads for track use.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny VF Series widebody kit (Pandem) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders (35mm wider front, 50mm wider rear). Custom carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractor vents (Seibon). Rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 adjustable carbon fiber wing (30mm taller than stock SS wing) with integrated third brake light.

Aero & Lighting: Custom front canards (Vorshlag Motorsport) and side skirts (APR carbon fiber) for downforce. Lighting upgraded to LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with Osram 5500K bulbs and custom sequential LED taillights (Vland). Blackout badges (3D carbon fiber Holden lion emblem) and de-chromed trim with satin black vinyl wrap (3M 2080).

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, half-cage with bolt-in X-brace) from Autopower. Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub. Gauges: AIM MXS Strada 7-inch dash with oil pressure, fuel pressure, and wideband AFR sensors. Shift knob: B&M Ripper short-throw (for Tremec conversion).
